title: Simple Markov Chain State Transition Diagram
description: A visual representation of a Markov Chain showing three distinct states and the probabilities of transitioning between them over discrete time steps.
relationships: State A has a self-loop with probability P(A|A) and transitions to State B with probability P(B|A)
State B has a self-loop with probability P(B|B) and transitions to State C with probability P(C|B)
State C has a self-loop with probability P(C|C) and transitions to State A with probability P(A|C)
